'''Grallia''' was a [[City/Legends|city]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]]. It was well-known for its enormous [[Grallia Spaceport|spaceport]].

{{City-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Episode I Adventures 3: The Fury of Darth Maul]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]''
